category_sources: source_facts.description says it runs a SQL-like language to query C/C++ files; official project page is ClangQL.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to AmrDeveloper/ClangQL; official GitHub repository and project page use ClangQL.
docs_sources: Official project documentation is hosted at amrdeveloper.github.io/ClangQL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SQL-like querying over C/C++ files; source_facts.executables lists the clangql CLI.
